description: Checks the reputation of a CSV list of IPv4 addresses within a file.
examples:
!cymru-bulk-whois entry_id=${File.EntryID}
Troubleshooting
#
In case of a problem with the proxy configuration, validate that the given proxy is working with the Whois content pack.

outputs.description: IP address. IP.ASN The autonomous system name for the IP address, for example: "AS8948".
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: The autonomous system owner of the IP address. IP.Geo.Country The country in which the IP address is located.
outputs.name: IP.ASOwner

outputs.description: The network of the contact for reporting abuse. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: IP.Registrar.Abuse.Network

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Reliability Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The IP address. TeamCymru.IP.ASN The IP ASN.
outputs.name: TeamCymru.IP.Address

outputs.description: The IP AS owner. TeamCymru.IP.Geo.Country The IP country.
outputs.name: TeamCymru.IP.ASOwner

outputs.description: The IP range relevant for abuse inquiries provided for the IP.
outputs.name: TeamCymru.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Network
